title: New Visual Keybing
description: NewVisualKeybing is a visual key binding management mod for Minecraft. It presents keyboard and mouse layouts so players can inspect, filter, and adjust key usage across a modpack.
body:
## Description

[![](https://badges.moddingx.org/curseforge/downloads/1539080)]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/new-visual-keybing](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/new-visual-keybing)) 
[![](https://badges.moddingx.org/modrinth/downloads/new-visual-keybing)]([https://modrinth.com/mod/new-visual-keybing](https://modrinth.com/mod/new-visual-keybing)) 

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/new-visual-keybing) 
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/new-visual-keybing)

NewVisualKeybing is a visual key binding management mod for Minecraft. It presents keyboard and mouse layouts so players can inspect, filter, and adjust key usage across a modpack.

### Features

- Visual keyboard, mouse, and wheel input status
- Filter bindings by mod, status, and search text
- Show free, current-mod, other-mod, and conflicting bindings
- Quickly unbind, rebind, and edit priority from the details panel
- Save, rename, apply, import, and export key binding profiles
- Multiple keyboard layouts and optional hiding of non-selected mod keys

### Opening

Press `K` by default to open the visual keybind viewer, or access it from the controls screen.

### modpack use

When using in a modpack, you must link back to the original link. Distribution of this mod's binary files in any form is not allowed.
